adminNote:
SKIPPED 2026-05-25 v2 - confirmed IKEA Cloudflare blocks BOTH dev IP AND prod worker IP.

EVIDENCE:
- First scrape (analyzer config): ~4.5min, 1 job, _detailNavStatus=http_error on the one item it found.
- Second scrape (my correct config, restored): 16s, 0 jobs. Worker's fetch of the listing URL returned the IKEA outer 404 SPA shell (page returns 'l-o nitan limtso et ha-amud' to non-residential IPs).
- Third scrape (4min cooldown later): same 16s, 0 jobs. Block persists for hours, not minutes.
- User confirmed the site loads fine in their normal residential browser. So the listing/Yii2 backend itself is up - the routing differential is purely IP-class based (datacenter ASNs get the 404 SPA shell, residential gets the Yii2 form/jobs).

CONFIG IS CORRECT and in place. itemSelector='.job-wrapper' matches all 115 jobs in the listing DOM. 6 listing-side fields (title/location/department/jobScope/detailUrl/externalJobId) all populate to 5/5 fill rate when the worker can reach the page. pageFlow has the canonical Select-All URL.

CURRENT BLOCKER:
- IKEA's Cloudflare appears to bot-detect datacenter IPs (worker is hosted on one), returning a 404 'page not found' for /il/he/webapp-local/work-with-us/* paths. The outer /il/he/this-is-ikea/* paths work fine for everyone. Symptom: a fresh worker IP gets ~1-2 successful scrapes then is blocked for hours.
- Even when not blocked, ~115 detail-page navs per scrape (115 jobs) burn the rate limit, triggering the next block. So this site is structurally hostile to a single-IP scraper that visits detail pages.

TO REVIVE / MAKE STABLE (in order of effort):
1. Worker change: throttle detail-page fetches to <=1 req / 2sec, or skip detail pages and only collect listing fields. (Smallest unblock; gives ~115 jobs/run with title+loc+dept+jobScope but no description.)
2. Worker change: route IKEA traffic through a residential-IP proxy pool (smart_proxy, BrightData, etc.). Most reliable long-term.
3. Worker change: load detail URLs as sub-resources of the parent iframe context (Sec-Fetch-Dest=iframe + parent session cookies) instead of top-level navs. Required if we want description/applicationInfo.

Until any of (1)/(2)/(3) ships, leaving SKIPPED.
